mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales indicates strengthening household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS snapshot available by decision date was 447715.0
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations or if the 3-year rolling Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing upward by more than 25 basis points over 3 months signals the start of monetary tightening, raises equity discount rates, and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot available by decision date was 0.14
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS increases are followed by nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if negative-hit accuracy is below 55% across walk-forward triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: When payroll employment rises over 3 months while unemployment falls, labor income and confidence improve together, increasing expected consumption and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS and UNRATE snapshots available by decision date were 142288.0 and 5.1
failure_condition: Reject if joint payroll gains and unemployment declines do not deliver higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than all other labor states, or if the return spread is negative over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer prices accelerate while the policy rate remains near zero, real rates fall and inflation uncertainty rises, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change crosses above 4% while FEDFUNDS < 0.50
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS snapshots available by decision date were 238.099 and 0.14
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-with-zero-rate episodes have positive average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if their returns are not lower than non-triggered periods at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing in industrial production over 3 months signals weakening physical output and earnings pressure for cyclical sectors, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO snapshot available by decision date was 107.0793
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contractions below the threshold are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered observations or if the average triggered return is above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A strong 6-month rise in housing starts signals expanding durable-goods demand, construction activity, and household formation, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST snapshot available by decision date was 1206.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST increases above the threshold are not followed by higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods, or if the triggered win rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals an abrupt deterioration in labor-market cash flows and recession risk repricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE snapshot available by decision date was 5.1
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases produce nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if the downside hit rate is below 55% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP and industrial production both rise over their latest available reporting windows, broad output growth confirms an earnings recovery and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly change > 0 and INDPRO 3-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:latest GDPC1 and INDPRO snapshots available by decision date were 16324.3 and 107.0793
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-output state has lower average 60-day S&P 500 returns than states where either GDPC1 or INDPRO is nonpositive, or if the return spread is negative in two consecutive 3-year windows.
